name: Mesh
summary: The Mesh class represents a mesh for drawing three-dimensional data.

constructors.name: Mesh
constructors.summary: Creates a new empty mesh instance.

constructors.name: Mesh
constructors.summary: Creates a new mesh instance with the given points, triangles and lines. Does not check the indices in the given triangles and lines array lists for correctness.

methods.name: AddLine
methods.summary: Adds a new line in the mesh.

methods.name: AddPoint
methods.summary: Adds a new point in the mesh.

methods.name: AddTriangle
methods.summary: Adds a new triangle in the mesh.

properties.name: Lines
properties.summary: An array list of indices (as integers) pointing to the points array list. Two consecutive indices always represent a single line.

properties.name: Points
properties.summary: An array list of point objects representing the mesh points.

properties.name: Triangles
properties.summary: An array list of indices (as integers) pointing to the points array list. Three consecutive indices always represent a single triangle.
